data.body:
## Description

Add *_confidence=confirmed|inferred output fields to every detection category in project-detect.sh.

### Confidence mapping:
- stack_confidence=confirmed — detect-stack.sh verifies marker file existence
- targets_confidence=confirmed — targets are read directly from Makefile/package.json
- db_confidence=confirmed when detected from docker-compose.yml image lines; db_confidence=inferred when detected from code imports or env vars
- ci_workflow_confidence — already exists, no change needed
- python_version_confidence — already exists, no change needed
- files_present_confidence=confirmed — files are checked with test -f
- installed_deps_confidence=confirmed — checked with command -v

### Implementation approach
After each existing echo statement for a detection category, add a corresponding echo for the confidence field. The value is determined by the verification method used.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/project-detect.sh (modify — add confidence output lines)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null; true
- [ ] bash tests/scripts/test-project-detect.sh exits 0 with all confidence tests passing
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-project-detect.sh
- [ ] Output contains stack_confidence=
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/project-detect.sh $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) | grep -q 'stack_confidence='
- [ ] Output contains targets_confidence=
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/project-detect.sh $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) | grep -q 'targets_confidence='
- [ ] Remove .test-index RED marker after tests pass GREEN
  Verify: ! grep -q 'project-detect.sh.*\[test_confidence_tagging' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
